onboarding.welcome_sub: A personal wardrobe of colours, rituals and products — curated for you, and only you.
onboarding.age_sub: Helps us understand your skin's needs.
onboarding.gender_sub: Toneup is for everyone. This is optional.
onboarding.skin_type_title: Do you know your skin type?
onboarding.goals_sub: Pick as many as you like.
onboarding.help_with_title: What would you like help with?
onboarding.help_with_sub: We'll build your experience around this.
onboarding.preferences_sub: We'll remember these in every recommendation.
onboarding.life_phase_title: Anything you'd like us to consider?
onboarding.life_phase_sub: Entirely optional. You can change this any time.
onboarding.complete_sub: Your Toneup is now personally curated.

home.trend_dryer: Your skin seems drier than usual this week
home.trend_redness: Redness has been elevated over the past few days
home.trend_glowing: Your skin is glowing right now
home.trend_balanced: Your skin is in great balance right now

season.title: Season profile
season.log_more_body: Log your skin 3 times this season to see your seasonal patterns.
season.based_on_logs: Based on {count} skin logs this season

bag.title: My makeup bag
bag.shade_history: Your colour history and shades that suit you
bag.empty_bag: Your makeup bag is empty. Add your first product.
bag.empty_loved: You haven't marked any products as loved yet.

advisor.title: Your personal beauty advisor
advisor.subtitle: Knows your skin, your products and your history.
advisor.upgrade_required: The AI advisor is a Pro feature.
advisor.quota_exceeded: You've reached this month's question limit.

skin_log.title: Skin log
skin_log.question: How does your skin feel today?
skin_log.choose_one: Choose one. Adjust the details after.

hydration.title: A moment of hydration
hydration.body: Your skin shows signs of dehydration. A richer layer this evening may help.

seasonal_return.title: Back to seasonal favourites
seasonal_return.body: These worked well for you this time last year.

sensitivity.title: A little extra calm
sensitivity.body: Your skin is showing signs of irritation. Consider pausing active ingredients for a few days.

product_review.title: Time to reconsider
product_review.body: You've logged reactions linked to this product several times.

reason.logged_dryness: You've logged dryness multiple times this week
reason.cold_season: We are in a cold season
reason.worked_last_year_same_season: These worked for you in the same season last year

calibrate.title: We read the light together
calibrate.subtitle: Hold a piece of white paper beside your face. It helps us read your skin precisely — regardless of the room you're in.
calibrate.step1_body: Near a window, but out of direct sun. Avoid fluorescent and warm lamps.
calibrate.step2_title: Hold up a piece of white paper
calibrate.step2_body: A regular sheet of paper held by your cheek is enough. This is your light reference.
calibrate.step3_title: Place your face in the oval
calibrate.step3_body: We'll guide you in real time and capture when the light is right.
calibrate.privacy_note: The image is processed on your device. Only the colour reading is stored — not the photo itself.

feedback.no_paper: Hold up a white sheet of paper
feedback.too_dim: We need a little more light
feedback.position_face: Place your face in the oval
feedback.steady_paper: Hold the paper steady and flat
feedback.failed: We couldn't read the light. Try again.

disclaimer.cosmetic_only: Toneup offers cosmetic guidance based on your own data — not medical advice. Please consult a healthcare professional if skin concerns persist.
